onboarding.welcomeBody: Complacency will be the death of you. Find a nemesis.
onboarding.bioTitle: Why would you make a worthy nemesis?
onboarding.ordealsSubtitle: The activities you'll challenge rivals in.
onboarding.ordealsLimit: Five ordeals suffice for any legend.
onboarding.radiusTitle: How far does thy enmity reach?
onboarding.notificationsAsk: Allow thy nemesis to disturb thy peace?

summon.shareText: I challenge thee. Download Nemesis and answer for thyself.
summon.pending: The summons is sent. Awaiting thy foe.
summon.dead: This summons has faded into legend.

home.title: Thy feuds
home.empty: No feuds yet. Summon a friend and begin.

landing.expired: This summons has faded into legend.

deck.locationAsk: Reveal thy whereabouts to find nearby foes?
deck.empty: No worthy adversaries within reach. Widen thy radius — or summon a friend.

feud.proofHint: Without proof, this is but a rumor. Rumors count all the same.
feud.proofAttached: Proof attached — this will be chronicled

forge.title: Taunt Forge
forge.subtitle: Compose thy insult
forge.spent: Thy venom is spent. Return at dawn.

arch.confirmBody: Declare thy arch-nemesis. You may do this once. Both shall be unmasked.
arch.received: {{name}} names thee arch-nemesis. Accept the unmasking pact?
arch.dissolveConfirm: Dissolve the pact? The chronicle freezes. Nothing more is revealed.

brutality.title: Brutality
brutality.1_desc: I want texts to be legible.
brutality.5_desc: The most brutal choice of all.

settings.deleteConfirm: Thy chronicle, feuds, and name shall be wiped from all records. Forever.

push.match: A nemesis has answered thy challenge.
push.declare: Thou hast been named an arch-nemesis.
